song.title: Take it All
song.lyrics:
[V1] Searching the world, the lost will be found In freedom we live, as one we cry out You carried the cross, You died and rose again My God, I’ll only give my all
[V2] You sent Your Son from heaven to earth You delivered us all, it’s eternally heard I searched for truth and all I found was You My God, I’ll only ever give my all
[C] Jesus we’re livin’ for Your name We’ll never be ashamed of You Our praise and all we are today Take, take, take it all Take, take, take it all
[V3] Running to the One who heals the blind Following the shining light In Your hands the power to save the world, my life
